fields.name: Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the title of the task.

fields.name: Created DateTime
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the task was created.

fields.name: Assigned To
fields.tooltip: Specifies who the task is assigned to.

fields.name: Completed DateTime
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the task was completed.

fields.name: Due DateTime
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the task must be completed.

fields.name: Percent Complete
fields.tooltip: Specifies the progress of the task.

fields.name: Start DateTime
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the task must start.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the task.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a descriptions of the task.

fields.name: Assigned To User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies who the task is assigned to.

fields.name: Object Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of window that the task opens.

fields.name: Object ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the window that the task opens.

fields.name: User Task Group Assigned To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the group if the task has been assigned to a group of people.
